title: Data Scientist
description: Unlock actionable insights from data by combining advanced mathematics, programming, and scientific reasoning.

courses.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning
courses.description: By Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani, and Jerome Friedman. The definitive guide for statistical modeling.

courses.title: Python for Data Analysis
courses.description: By Wes McKinney (creator of Pandas). Data wrangling with Pandas, NumPy, and IPython.

courses.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning
courses.description: By Christopher Bishop. An essential textbook covering Bayesian methods and graphical models.

courses.title: Weapons of Math Destruction
courses.description: By Cathy O'Neil. Important considerations on how algorithms can increase inequality and threaten democracy.

details.importance: They translate vast oceans of raw data into actionable strategies, saving resources and highlighting hidden opportunities.
details.rolesAndResponsibilities: Performing statistical analysis, building predictive models, and communicating insights to non-technical stakeholders.
details.aiImpact: AI can automate standard reporting, but asking the right questions and formulating the hypothesis requires deep business and statistical intuition.
details.marketDemand: High. Almost every major industry requires dedicated data science teams today.

expectations.junior: Clean and preprocess data, build simple regression/classification models, and generate straightforward reports.
expectations.mid: Own end-to-end data pipelines, mentor juniors, and develop complex predictive engines.
expectations.senior: Define organizational data strategies, align modeling with core business metrics, and evangelize data literacy.
